failedAssertions.reason: Client-side blocking is present, but field-level validation feedback is missing. The normal selector UX prevents arbitrary raw country/currency text, yet invalid company input produced no inline error state or message.

appliedUpdates.description: Added auth-shell seeded-fixture setup notes, secure-cookie handling guidance, current browser concurrency reduction, and browser/API isolation guidance for this milestone.

Documented auth-browser and onboarding-browser frictions discovered during flow validation: agent-browser may omit successful sign-in POST visibility, and the seeded teamless fixture should be treated as single-use for browser retries.
